conventions.isSentinelSolution: true = entry is an Azure-Sentinel marketplace solution. false = entry is a native Azure/Microsoft table with no Sentinel solution; consumer should generate DCR/DCE directly from the schema.
conventions.streamPrefix: Tables ending in '_CL' use stream name 'Custom-<TableName>'; all other tables use 'Microsoft-<TableName>'.
